km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: Alice Walter於大約1315年出生在英國英格蘭。她於大約1328年與Walter Parles Sheriff結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Walter于大约1315年出生在英国英格兰。她于大约1328年与Walter Parles Sheriff结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Walthers
meanings: German: patronymic from the personal name Walther (see Walter ).

variants.name: McQuate
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uait ‘son of Uat’, Gaelic form of the personal name Wat, a short form of Walter . Compare the Irish form McQuaid .

variants.name: Waltke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Jurgen, Wilhelmina.
German: from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with Old High German waltan ‘to rule’ as the first element, as in Walter .

variants.name: McWaters
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uaitéir, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of the personal name Walter , with excrescent English -s.

variants.name: Wahler
meanings: German:
from the personal name Wol(d)er, Low German form of Walter .
habitational name for someone from any of various places called Wahl, Wahle, or Wahlen.

variants.name: McWalter
meanings: Irish and Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Uaitéir ‘son of Walter ’.

variants.name: Walters
meanings: English: variant of Walter , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
German: patronymic from   Walter  .

variants.name: McQuaid
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Colum, Nuala.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uaid ‘son of Uad’, Gaelic form of the personal name Wat, a short form of Walter . Compare the Scottish form McQuate .

variants.name: Walther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Wolfgang, Otto, Gerhard, Gunter, Heinz, Klaus, Konrad, Bernd, Bernhard.
German, Dutch, Swedish, and Danish: variant of   Walter  .

variants.name: Lauter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Erwin, Kurt, Sigismund, Wolf.

German: topographic name and habitational name, from a common stream name meaning ‘clear’, from Middle High German hlutra, or from any of the places called Lauter or Lauta (Saxony). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and some other European countries.
Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian Lavtar or its Croatized and rare Slovenian variant Lautar: from a dialect variant of the personal name Valter (see Walter ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

en.lifeSummary: Alice Walter was born about 1315, in England, United Kingdom. She married Walter Parles Sheriff about 1328. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Walter est née environ 1315, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Walter Parles Sheriff environ 1328. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Walter wurde um 1315 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1328 Walter Parles Sheriff geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Walter è nata il circa 1315 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Walter Parles Sheriff circa 1328. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Walterは約1315年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。約1328年にWalter Parles Sheriffと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Walter(은)는 대략 1315년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1328년 Walter Parles Sheriff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice Walter nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Walter Parles Sheriff aproximadamente 1328. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Walter родилась около 1315 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Parles Sheriff около 1328 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Alice Walter nació aproximadamente 1315, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Walter Parles Sheriff aproximadamente 1328. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
